Reference

Nice Classification

The international classification of goods and services for trademark registration, as adopted by CNIPA (China National Intellectual Property Administration). All 45 classes with complete item lists.

45
Total Classes
34
Goods Classes
11
Services Classes
|

Jump to Class

Goods (1-34) Services (35-45)

Goods (1–34)

Products, materials, and tangible items

Services (35–45)

Professional, commercial, and service activities

Our experts will help you identify the correct classes for your trademark filing.
